steps.title: Read the vertex
steps.content:
The function is in vertex form.
$$
f(x)=\frac{1}{8}(x-5)^2+3
$$
In $a(x-h)^2+k$, the vertex is $(h,k)$, so this vertex is $(5,3)$.

steps.title: Interpret the minimum
steps.content: The coefficient of the squared term is positive, so the vertex gives the minimum value of the function. Here $x=5$ is the time in seconds, and $f(x)=3$ is the height in inches. The answer is A.
